vita: Born on the bustling spaceport planet of Thraxia, I carved my path as a pirate captain navigating between rival factions. My ship's sails are always set to catch star winds across known galaxies for trade or plunder.
portrait_prompt: A robust Syl'nar with weathered skin and piercing eyes, adorned in traditional Syl’nar attire featuring sleek silver armor accented by a luminescent tattoo signifying my rank. The backdrop is the star-filled cosmos seen through an airlock window onboard his ship, reflecting off polished metal surfaces.
